title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Many Umamusume and those who work with them
dream of winning the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crown and the glory that it represents
captivates all those who behold it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even those who once failed to achieve it are
forever bound by its spell.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The atmosphere here is more heated than at the
Satsuki Sho.
choice_data_list:
Everyone's probably extra excited because of
who's running today.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
There are competitors today who didn't run in the
Satsuki Sho, including last year's Best Junior-Year
racers, as well as...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clack... clack...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: May the best racer win.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hello, Ardan. Yes, may the best racer win.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I'll see you out there.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Right. See you soon.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hi, Yaeno.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Let's have a great race today!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Indeed. May we both finish with no regrets.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: See you out there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki's two rivals, Mejiro Ardan and
Sakura Chiyono O, leave promptly after
exchanging brief greetings.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As their footsteps fade into silence, tension fills
the runners' tunnel. The air is so ponderously
thick, I can hardly breathe, much less make a
sound.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though their visit was brief, the intensity they
brought with them is suffocating.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Take deep breaths. You'll faint if you keep
holding your breath like that.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Yes, you're doing good. Breathe in... and breathe
out...
choice_data_list: I didn't even realize I was holding my breath...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'm not surprised you forgot to breathe in this
intense atmosphere.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I have experienced the same kind of pressure in
the world of martial arts.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
During major tournaments, where even the
possibility of losing cannot be humored, everyone
exudes the same aura.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
We must match their intensity if we're not to be
cowed!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Inhale...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: YAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...Phew.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: With that, let us take to the battlefield!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: (Chiyono O, Ardan...)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(The three of us have walked side by side down
the path of the Classic Triple Crown tour...)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(Which is why I know exactly how much the Derby
means to you two.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I'm prepared to wager my very life at the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
And if I were to burn out, never to race again, so
be it.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
There's no way I'll let anyone have the Japanese
Derby!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna win it for Maruzen!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
But it's precisely because the three of us have
pushed each other to become our very best this
whole time...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: That I want to beat you both!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Let us test the depth of our resolve!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: The glory of the Japanese Derby shall be mine!
